title: Hornstedtia rubra
taxonomy: Hornstedtia rubra is classified within the family Zingiberaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as gingers. This plant is further classified within the genus Hornstedtia, which is a genus of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. The species Hornstedtia rubra is a type of flowering plant that is often found in tropical regions. It is a member of the order Zingiberales, which is a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their distinctive flowers and inflorescences. The classification of Hornstedtia rubra reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the same family and order.

intro: Hornstedtia rubra, also known as the Red Flag Lily, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia.
